# Walkthrough Python Sample

Code for this sample is in [./main.py](./main.py).

## Prerequisites

Linux >= 5.6 is the only production environment we
support. But for ease of development we also support macOS and Windows.
* Python (or PyPy, etc) >= `3.7`

## Setup

First, clone this repo and `cd` into `archerdb/src/clients/python/samples/walkthrough`.

Then, install the ArcherDB client:

```console
pip install archerdb
```

## Start the ArcherDB server

Follow steps in the repo README to [run
ArcherDB](/README.md#running-archerdb).

If you are not running on port `localhost:3000`, set
the environment variable `ARCHERDB_ADDRESS` to the full
address of the ArcherDB server you started.

## Run this sample

Now you can run this sample:

```console
python3 main.py
```

## Walkthrough

Here's what this project does.

## 1. Insert initial position

This project inserts an initial GeoEvent for a tracked entity.

## 2. Update positions

It then upserts multiple GeoEvents to represent a movement path.

## 3. Validate latest position

It queries the latest position by UUID and validates the final stop.

## 4. Delete entity

Finally, it deletes the entity and verifies the delete took effect.
